Kodeliste, der viser forbindelsen mellem strukturerede noter og momskoder i momsbeskeden

Codeliste zum Anzeigen der Verbindung zwischen strukturierten Hinweisen und MWST-Codes in der MWST-Benachrichtigung
Code list to show the connection between structured notes and GST codes in the GST notification
Code list to show the connection between structured notes and GST/HST codes in the GST/HST notification

Code list to show the connection between structured notes and VAT codes in the VAT notification

Koodiluettelo, josta käy ilmi jäsennettyjen huomautusten ja ALV-ilmoituksen ALV-koodien välinen yhteys

Kódlista, amely a strukturált megjegyzések és áfakódok közötti kapcsolatot jeleníti meg az áfaértesítésben
Kóðalisti sem sýnir tengingu milli skipulagðra athugasemda og VSK-kóða í VSK-tilkynningu

Kodų sąrašas, skirtas nurodyti ryšį tarp struktūruotų pastabų ir PVM kodų PVM pranešime
Kodu saraksts, kurā parādīta saistība starp strukturētām piezīmēm un PVN kodiem PVN paziņojumā
Kodeliste for å vise koblingen mellom strukturerte merknader og mva-koder i mva-varslingen

Список кодов, который показывает связь между структурированными примечаниями и кодами НДС в уведомлении о НДС.
Kodlista som visar kopplingen mellan strukturerade noteringar och momskoder i momsmeddelandet

用于表示增值税通知中结构化注释和增值税代码之间的联系的代码列表

EREnumDefinition.Description: VAT code provided by the Tax Administration
EREnumDefinition.Label: Standard tax codes
EREnumDefinition.Name: StandardTaxCodes

EREnumDefinition.Description: Code list for further specification of VAT
EREnumDefinition.Label: @GER_LABEL:VATSpecification
EREnumDefinition.Name: VATSpecification

ERFormatComponentPropertyBinding.ExpressionAsString: model.'Tax declaration header'.TechnicalInfo.SoftwareName & " " & model.'Tax declaration header'.TechnicalInfo.SoftwareVersion

ERModelExpressionItem.ExpressionAsString:
CASE ( '#Period'.'$FromMonth',
"01", true, "03", true, "05", true, "07", true, "09", true, "11", true,
false )

CASE ( '#Period'.'$ToMonth',
"02", true, "04", true, "06", true, "08", true, "10", true, "12", true,
false )

CASE ( '#Period'.'$FromMonth',
"01", IF('#Period'.'$FromDay' = "01", "foerste halvdel januar", "andre halvdel januar"), "02", IF('#Period'.'$FromDay' = "01", "foerste halvdel februar", "andre halvdel februar"), "03", IF('#Period'.'$FromDay' = "01", "foerste halvdel mars", "andre halvdel mars"), "04", IF('#Period'.'$FromDay' = "01", "foerste halvdel april", "andre halvdel april"), "05", IF('#Period'.'$FromDay' = "01", "foerste halvdel mai", "andre halvdel mai"), "06", IF('#Period'.'$FromDay' = "01", "foerste halvdel juni", "andre halvdel juni"), "07", IF('#Period'.'$FromDay' = "01", "foerste halvdel juli", "andre halvdel juli"), "08", IF('#Period'.'$FromDay' = "01", "foerste halvdel august", "andre halvdel august"), "09", IF('#Period'.'$FromDay' = "01", "foerste halvdel september", "andre halvdel september"), "10", IF('#Period'.'$FromDay' = "01", "foerste halvdel oktober", "andre halvdel oktober"), "11", IF('#Period'.'$FromDay' = "01", "foerste halvdel november", "andre halvdel november"), "12", IF('#Period'.'$FromDay' = "01", "foerste halvdel desember", "andre halvdel desember"),
"" )

CASE ( '#Period'.'$FromMonth',
"01", true, "04", true, "07", true, "10", true,
false )

CASE ( '#Period'.'$ToMonth',
"03", true, "06", true, "09", true, "12", true,
false )

CASE ( '#Period'.'$ToMonth',
"03", IF('#Period'.'$ToDay'="31", true, false), "06", IF('#Period'.'$ToDay'="30", true, false), "09", IF('#Period'.'$ToDay'="30", true, false), "12", IF('#Period'.'$ToDay'="31", true, false),
false )

ERExpressionStringConstant.Value: NO VAT Generate VAT return submission
NO VAT Note for VAT return

ERModelExpressionItem.ExpressionAsString: WHERE ( model.'$TaxTransactionsGrouping', AND ( OR ( model.'$TaxTransactionsGrouping'.aggregated.TaxBaseAmountCur <> 0, model.'$TaxTransactionsGrouping'.aggregated.DeductibleSalesTaxCur <> 0 ), OR ( model.'$TaxTransactionsGrouping'.grouped.'$IsSales', AND ( model.'$TaxTransactionsGrouping'.lines.'$StandardTaxCode'<>"82", model.'$TaxTransactionsGrouping'.lines.'$StandardTaxCode'<>"84", model.'$TaxTransactionsGrouping'.lines.'$StandardTaxCode'<>"85", model.'$TaxTransactionsGrouping'.lines.'$StandardTaxCode'<>"87", model.'$TaxTransactionsGrouping'.lines.'$StandardTaxCode'<>"89" ) ) ) )

ERFormatComponentPropertyBinding.ExpressionAsString: model.'Tax declaration header'.TechnicalInfo.SoftwareName & " " & model.'Tax declaration header'.TechnicalInfo.SoftwareVersion

ERModelExpressionItem.ExpressionAsString: WHERE ( model.'$TaxTransactionsGrouping', AND ( OR ( model.'$TaxTransactionsGrouping'.aggregated.TaxBaseAmountCur <> 0, model.'$TaxTransactionsGrouping'.aggregated.DeductibleSalesTaxCur <> 0 ), OR ( model.'$TaxTransactionsGrouping'.grouped.'$IsSales', AND ( model.'$TaxTransactionsGrouping'.lines.'$StandardTaxCode'<>"82", model.'$TaxTransactionsGrouping'.lines.'$StandardTaxCode'<>"84", model.'$TaxTransactionsGrouping'.lines.'$StandardTaxCode'<>"85", model.'$TaxTransactionsGrouping'.lines.'$StandardTaxCode'<>"87", model.'$TaxTransactionsGrouping'.lines.'$StandardTaxCode'<>"89" ) ) ) )
